introduction: In this presentation, we will examine MediConn's current strategies in using social media platforms and how these strategies contribute to our customer acquisition efforts.

subsections.heading: Overview of MediConn's Digital Marketing Strategies
subsections.content:
• MediConn Solutions launched its digital marketing strategy in 2015
• The main goal was to increase brand visibility and drive web traffic
• The strategy was developed and executed by the internal marketing team
• Emphasis was placed on SEO, content marketing, and email marketing
• A 30% increase in web traffic was noted in the first year
• Partnered with several online health forums and blogs for guest posting
subsections.justification: Details of the company's digital marketing strategies, but does not indicate if social media is used to attract new customers

subsections.heading: Assessment of Social Media Engagement
subsections.content:
• MediConn has a presence on several social media platforms
• Regular posting and engagement with users on these platforms
• Partnerships with influencers in the health sector for promotion
• An external agency was hired to manage social media engagement
• The company tracks key metrics such as likes, shares, and comments
• Conducts regular audits to assess the performance of social media activities
subsections.justification: Outlines the company's social media activities but does not specify if these are used for customer acquisition

subsections.heading: Impact of Social Media on Customer Acquisition
subsections.content:
• The marketing team regularly monitors customer acquisition channels
• Social media analytics tools are used to track performance
• A significant number of website visitors are referred from social media
• Regular updates to social media strategies based on performance
• Engagement on social media posts is a key performance indicator
• The company believes in the power of social media but continually tests other channels
subsections.justification: Details the company's approach to social media performance tracking but does not specify if it is used for customer acquisition

conclusion: Social media plays a crucial role in MediConn's customer acquisition strategy by increasing our visibility and engagement with potential customers. Going forward, we recommend allocating more resources to strengthen our social media presence and to capitalize on this cost-effective acquisition channel.
